snippet.title: KRISKO ft. TONI STORARO - GRESHNA SI (Official Video)
snippet.description:
–ó–į —É—á–į—Ā—ā–ł—Ź: 0882 211 511

Lyrics by Krisko
Music by Krisko, Maxxseed
Arrangement by MaxxSeed, Krisko
Directed by Krisko, Viktor Antonov - Rikk
Starring - Santa Kitana

Follow Krisko:
https://www.instagram.com/kriskobeats/
https://www.facebook.com/kriskoofficial

Follow Toni Storaro:
https://www.instagram.com/toni_storaro

Supported by: 
Nedelya The Cake Company - http://nedelya.com
EasySkinz - https://easyskinz.com/

–ö—Ä–ł—Ā–ļ–ĺ –ł –Ę–ĺ–Ĺ–ł –°—ā–ĺ—Ä–į—Ä–ĺ - –ď—Ä–Ķ—ą–Ĺ–į —Ā–ł

LYRICS:
–ď—Ä–Ķ—ą–Ĺ–į —Ā–ł
–ł –≥–ĺ –Ņ–ł—ą–Ķ –Ĺ–į –Ľ–ł—Ü–Ķ—ā–ĺ —ā–ł
–ł –ī–ĺ—Ä–ł –Ĺ–į –ļ—Ä—ä—Ā—ā–į –ī–į –≥–ĺ—Ä–ł—ą
–Ĺ—Ź–ľ–į –ī–į –≥–ĺ –Ņ—Ä–ł–∑–Ĺ–į–Ķ—ą, –Ĺ–ĺ –≥—Ä–Ķ—Ö–ĺ–≤–Ķ—ā–Ķ —Ā–ł –∑–Ĺ–į–Ķ—ą
–ď—Ä–Ķ—ą–Ĺ–į —Ā–ł
–ļ–ĺ–Ľ–ļ–ĺ—ā–ĺ —Ö–ł–Ľ—Ź–ī–į –≤–Ķ—Č–ł—Ü–ł
–ł —Ā–≤–Ķ—ā–ł—Ü–į –ī–į —Ā–Ķ –Ņ—Ä–Ķ—Ä–ĺ–ī–ł—ą
—á–į—Ā—ā –ĺ—ā –ľ–Ķ–Ĺ –Ņ–į–ļ —Č–Ķ —Ā—ā—Ä–į–ī–į –Ĺ–ĺ, —Č–Ķ —ā–ł –≥–ĺ –≤—ä—Ä–Ĺ–Ķ —Ā—ä–ī–Ī–į—ā–į

–ö—É–Ņ–Ľ–Ķ—ā 1:

–ě—Č–Ķ –Ņ–ĺ–ľ–Ĺ—Ź –ļ–į–ļ —ā–Ķ–Ľ–Ķ—Ą–ĺ–Ĺ–į —ā–ł –∑–≤—ä–Ĺ–ł 
–ĺ—Č–Ķ –į—Ä–ĺ–ľ–į—ā–į —ā–ł –Ņ–ĺ –ī—Ä–Ķ—Ö–ł—ā–Ķ —Ā—ā–ĺ–ł 
–í—Ā–ł—á–ļ–ĺ –Ķ–Ļ —ā–į–ļ–į –∑–į –Ĺ–ł—Č–ĺ –≥–ĺ –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–ł–≥—Ä–į
–ł –ļ–į–∂–ł –ľ–ł —á–Ķ—Ā—ā–Ĺ–ĺ –Ņ–ĺ-–ī–ĺ–Ī—Ä–Ķ –Ľ–ł –Ķ —Ā–Ķ–≥–į?

–Ę–≤–ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ —Ā–Ľ–Ķ–ī–ł –≥–ĺ–Ĺ—Ź –≥–ł –Ĺ–į–ī–į–Ľ–Ķ—á
–Ĺ–ł—Č–ĺ —Ö—É–Ī–į–≤–ĺ –Ĺ–Ķ —Ā–Ľ–Ķ–ī–≤–į –į–ļ–ĺ —Ā–Ķ –≤—ä—Ä–Ĺ–į –Ņ—Ä–ł —ā–Ķ–Ī 
–Ę–ł –ļ—ä–Ľ–Ĺ–Ķ—ą–Ķ —Ā–Ķ —Ā—ä—Ä—Ü–Ķ—ā–ĺ –∑–į –ľ–Ķ–Ĺ –≥–ĺ—Ä–ł
–Ĺ–ĺ —Ź–≤–Ĺ–ĺ –≤ —ā–ĺ–∑–ł –ī–Ķ–Ĺ —Ā—ä—Ä—Ü–Ķ—ā–ĺ –Ĺ–Ķ —Ā–Ķ –Ī—Ä–ĺ–ł
–Ę–ł –ī–ĺ–Ī—Ä–Ķ –Ľ—ä–∂–Ķ—ą –ľ–Ķ –≤—ä–≤ –ļ—Ä—ä–≤—á–ł—Ü–į—ā–į —ā–ł –Ķ 
–≤ –ļ–ĺ—ą–į –∑–į –Ņ—Ä–į–Ĺ–Ķ –ł –ī—É—ą–ł—Ü–į—ā–į —ā–ł –Ķ
–ľ —á–Ķ—Ä–Ĺ–į —Ā–ł –ļ–į—ā–ĺ —Ä–į—Ā–ĺ—ā–ĺ –Ĺ–į –Ņ–ĺ–Ņ
–Ĺ–Ķ–∂–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ —ā–ł —Ä—ä—Ü–Ķ —Ä–ł—Ā—É–≤–į—ā –Ņ–ĺ –ľ–ĺ—Ź –≥—Ä–ĺ–Ī

–ö—É–Ņ–Ľ–Ķ—ā 2:

–ď—Ä–Ķ—ą–Ĺ–į —Ā–ł –Ĺ–ĺ –ī–į–Ľ–ł –Ĺ–Ķ –≥—Ä–Ķ—ą–į —Ā—ä—Ā —ā–Ķ–Ī –ł –į–∑ 
–ł–ľ–į—ą–Ķ –ļ–Ľ–Ķ–≤–Ķ—ā–ł, –ł–ľ–į—ą–Ķ –Ľ—é–Ī–ĺ–≤ –ł —Ā—ā—Ä–į—Ā—ā
—ā–ł –Ņ–ĺ–ļ–į–∑–į –ľ–ł —Ä–į–∑–Ľ–ł–ļ–į—ā–į –ľ–Ķ–∂–ī—É –Ĺ–į—Ā 
—Ü–Ķ–Ľ—É–≤–į—Ö —ā–Ķ–Ī —ā–ł —Ü–Ķ–Ľ—É–≤–į—ą–Ķ –Ņ–į—Ä–ł –ł –≤–Ľ–į—Ā—ā
–Ē–į —ā–į–ļ–į–≤–į —Ā–ł –Ī–ł–Ľ–į –≤–ł–Ĺ–į–≥–ł
–∑–į–ī –≥—Ä–ł–ľ–į —Ā–ł, –Ĺ–Ķ–Ņ—Ä–Ķ–ī–≤–ł–ī–ł–ľ–į —Ā–ł 
–∑–Ĺ–į–ľ —á–Ķ —Ā —ā–Ķ–Ī –≥—Ä–Ķ—ą–į –Ĺ–ĺ —Ā—ā—Ä—É–≤–į —Ā–ł 
–ī–į —ā–Ķ —Ā–Ņ–į—Ā—Ź –Ĺ–ĺ –ľ–Ķ–Ĺ –ļ–ĺ–Ļ —Č–Ķ —Ā–Ņ–į—Ā–ł

snippet.title: Joe Biden stumbles on steps of Air Force One
snippet.description:
The US president stumbled while boarding Air Force One on his way to visit to Atlanta, Georgia, to meet with Asian American community leaders. Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major

localized.title: Joe Biden stumbles on steps of Air Force One
localized.description:
The US president stumbled while boarding Air Force One on his way to visit to Atlanta, Georgia, to meet with Asian American community leaders. Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major

snippet.title: Lamborghini Urus v BMW X6M - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Head to http://bit.ly/-Spring-Event to check out a load of all-new carwow Spring Deals! Be quick though - they‚Äôre only there until March 31st! 
.............................................................

Check out Yiannimize - http://youtube.com/yiannimize

It‚Äôs Saturday morning, so you know what time it is‚Ä¶ Time for another Mat vs Yianni showdown!! 

We‚Äôve got a BMW X6M Competition going up against a Lamborghini Urus (no prizes for guessing who‚Äôs in which car)! These two SUV heavyweights are going head-to-head over the quarter-mile, and when looking at stats alone, you might think it‚Äôll be an easy win for the Urus! 

Under the Lambo‚Äôs bonnet, you‚Äôll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which can deliver 650hp and 850Nm. As for the BMW, it may pack a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, but it only puts down 625hp & 750Nm! But that‚Äôs not all‚Ä¶ The Urus is also 200kg lighter than the X6M! 

Now, of course, we know the BMW has one trick up its sleeve - an EPIC launch system! The question is, will it be enough to snatch the win on this wet track? There‚Äôs only one way to find out‚Ä¶ LET‚ÄôS RACE!

snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube‚Äč‚Äč

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa‚Äč #FutureNostalgia‚Äč #Grammys

–ó–į–Ņ–ĺ—á–≤–į–ľ–Ķ —Ā –Ķ–ī–ł–Ĺ —Ä–į–∑–Ī–ł—ā –ľ–ł—ā —Ā –°–ź–© (USA), –ļ—ä–ī–Ķ—ā–ĺ —Ā–≥—ä–≤–į—ā –Ķ–ī–ł–Ĺ –Ľ–ł—Ā—ā –Ņ–ĺ–≤–Ķ—á–Ķ –ĺ—ā —Ą–ł–∑–ł—á–Ķ—Ā–ļ–ł –≤—ä–∑–ľ–ĺ–∂–Ĺ–ĺ—ā–ĺ. –í—ä–≤ –§—Ä–į–Ĺ—Ü–ł—Ź –Ĺ–ł –ĺ–Ī—Ź—Ā–Ĺ—Ź–≤–į—ā –ļ–į–ļ–≤–ĺ –Ĺ–į–ł—Ā—ā–ł–Ĺ–į –ĺ–∑–Ĺ–į—á–į–≤–į –į–ľ–į—ā—Ć–ĺ—Ä –ł –∑–į—Č–ĺ –≥–ĺ —Ä–į–∑–Ī–ł—Ä–į–ľ–Ķ –≥—Ä–Ķ—ą–Ĺ–ĺ. –ė–ľ–į–ľ –ł –Ķ–ī–ł–Ĺ –Ķ–ļ—Ā–Ņ–Ķ—Ä–ł–ľ–Ķ–Ĺ—ā: –ź–ļ–ĺ –Ņ–ĺ—ā—ä—Ä—Ā–ł—ā–Ķ –≤ Google –ī—É–ľ–į—ā–į —á–į—Ā–ĺ–≤–Ĺ–ł–ļ, —Č–Ķ –∑–į–Ī–Ķ–Ľ–Ķ–∂–ł—ā–Ķ –Ĺ–Ķ—Č–ĺ —Ā—ā—Ä–į–Ĺ–Ĺ–ĺ. –í—Ā–ł—á–ļ–ł –ĺ–Ĺ–Ľ–į–Ļ–Ĺ –ľ–į–≥–į–∑–ł–Ĺ–ł –ł–ľ–į—ā –Ņ–ĺ–ī–ĺ–Ī–Ĺ–ł —Ā–Ĺ–ł–ľ–ļ–ł, –Ĺ–ĺ –∑–į—Č–ĺ? –©–Ķ –∑–į—Ā–Ķ–≥–Ĺ–Ķ–ľ –ł –ĺ—Ā–Ĺ–ĺ–≤–į—ā–Ķ–Ľ—Ź –Ĺ–į Apple, –°—ā–ł–≤ –Ē–∂–ĺ–Ī—Ā, –ļ–ĺ–Ļ—ā–ĺ –Ķ –ł–ľ–į–Ľ –Ĺ–Ķ—Č–ĺ –ĺ–Ī—Č–ĺ —Ā –ź–Ļ–Ĺ—Č–į–Ļ–Ĺ. –í –°–Ķ–≤–Ķ—Ä–Ĺ–į –ź–ľ–Ķ—Ä–ł–ļ–į –ł–ľ–į –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ —Ü–≤–Ķ—ā–Ķ, –ļ–ĺ–Ķ—ā–ĺ —Ü—ä—Ą—ā–ł –≤–Ķ–ī–Ĺ—ä–∂ –Ĺ–į 40 –≥–ĺ–ī–ł–Ĺ–ł. –ó–į—Č–ĺ –ł–Ĺ—á–ĺ–≤–Ķ—ā–Ķ —Ā–į —Ā–Ķ –Ĺ–į–Ľ–ĺ–∂–ł–Ľ–ł –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ľ–Ķ—Ä–Ĺ–į –Ķ–ī–ł–Ĺ–ł—Ü–į –ī–ĺ—Ä–ł –ł –Ņ—Ä–ł –Ĺ–į—Ā –ł –ļ–į–ļ–≤–ĺ –ĺ–Ī—Č–ĺ –ł–ľ–į –ź–Ĺ–≥–Ľ–ł—Ź –ł–Ľ–ł —ā—Ź–Ľ–ĺ—ā–ĺ –Ĺ–ł —Ā —ā–ĺ–≤–į? –©–Ķ –≥–ĺ–≤–ĺ—Ä–ł–ľ –ł –∑–į –ď–Ķ—Ä–ľ–į–Ĺ–ł—Ź, –ļ—ä–ī–Ķ—ā–ĺ –į—Ä—Ö–Ķ–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ–∑–ł –ĺ—ā–ļ—Ä–ł–≤–į—ā –Ĺ–Ķ—Č–ĺ –ľ–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –ł–Ĺ—ā–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—Ā–Ĺ–ĺ - —Ą–Ľ–Ķ–Ļ—ā–į –Ĺ–į 43 000 –≥–ĺ–ī–ł–Ĺ–ł. –ź–ļ–ĺ –ľ–ł—Ā–Ľ–ł—ā–Ķ, —á–Ķ –ē–≥–ł–Ņ–Ķ—ā –Ķ –ł–Ĺ—ā–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—Ā–Ĺ–į —ā—É—Ä–ł—Ā—ā–ł—á–Ķ—Ā–ļ–į –ī–Ķ—Ā—ā–ł–Ĺ–į—Ü–ł—Ź, —ā–ĺ –Ņ–ĺ-–ī–ĺ–Ī—Ä–Ķ –ī–į –∑–Ĺ–į–Ķ—ā–Ķ –ļ–į–ļ–≤–ĺ —Ā–į –Ņ—Ä–į–≤–ł–Ľ–ł —Ā —Ą–į—Ä–į–ĺ–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ —Ā–ł.

–ó–Ĺ–į–Ķ—Ö—ā–Ķ –Ľ–ł, —á–Ķ —Ą–ł—ā–Ĺ–Ķ—Ā–ł—ā–Ķ –ł –Ņ—ä—ā–Ķ–ļ–ł—ā–Ķ –∑–į –Ī—Ź–≥–į–Ĺ–Ķ —Ā–į –ł–∑–ĺ–Ī—Ä–Ķ—ā–Ķ–Ĺ–ł –≤ –ź–Ĺ–≥–Ľ–ł—Ź? –ú–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–ł–∑–≤–ĺ–ī–ł—ā–Ķ–Ľ–ł –Ĺ–į —Ā–ľ–į—Ä—ā—Ą–ĺ–Ĺ–ł –Ņ—ä–ļ —ā–Ķ—Ā—ā–≤–į—ā –∑–ī—Ä–į–≤–ł–Ĺ–į—ā–į –Ĺ–į —É—Ā—ā—Ä–ĺ–Ļ—Ā—ā–≤–į—ā–į —Ā–ł –Ĺ–į–Ķ–ľ–į–Ļ–ļ–ł –Ņ–ĺ-–Ņ—ä–Ľ–Ĺ–ł —Ö–ĺ—Ä–į. –ú–ĺ–∂–Ķ –ī–į –≤–ł –Ķ –ł–Ĺ—ā–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—Ā–Ĺ–ĺ –ī–į —Ā–Ķ –∑–į–Ņ–ĺ–∑–Ĺ–į–Ķ—ā–Ķ —Ā –Ĺ–į–Ļ-—É—Ö–ł–Ľ–Ķ–Ĺ–ĺ—ā–ĺ –∂–ł–≤–ĺ—ā–Ĺ–ĺ –≤ —Ā–≤–Ķ—ā–į. –Ę–ĺ –∂–ł–≤–Ķ–Ķ –≤ –ź–≤—Ā—ā—Ä–į–Ľ–ł—Ź. –ź–ļ–ĺ —Ā—ā–Ķ –≥–Ľ–į–ī–Ķ–Ĺ –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –≤—ä–Ľ–ļ, —ā–ĺ —ā—Ä—Ź–Ī–≤–į –ī–į –∑–Ĺ–į–Ķ—ā–Ķ, —á–Ķ —ā–ĺ–∑–ł –ł–∑—Ä–į–∑ —Ā–ł –ł–ľ–į –ļ–ĺ—Ä–Ķ–Ĺ. –Ę–Ķ–∑–ł —Ö–ł—Č–Ĺ–ł—Ü–ł —Ā–į —Ä–Ķ–ļ–ĺ—Ä–ī—Ć–ĺ—Ä–ł –Ņ–ĺ –Ņ–ĺ–≥—ä–Ľ–Ĺ–į—ā–į —Ö—Ä–į–Ĺ–į. –í –Į–Ņ–ĺ–Ĺ–ł—Ź –ī–ĺ —Ā–ļ–ĺ—Ä–ĺ –Ĺ–Ķ –Ķ –ľ–ĺ–≥–Ľ–ĺ –ī–į —Ā–Ķ —ā–į–Ĺ—Ü—É–≤–į —Ā–Ľ–Ķ–ī –Ņ–ĺ–Ľ—É–Ĺ–ĺ—Č. –ú–ĺ–∂–Ķ –ī–į –Ĺ–Ķ —Ä–į–∑–Ī–ł—Ä–į—ā–Ķ –ĺ—ā —Ą–ł–Ĺ–į–Ĺ—Ā–ł, –Ĺ–ĺ –≤ –ź–≤—Ā—ā—Ä–į–Ľ–ł—Ź –ł–ľ–į –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–į –Ņ—ā–ł—Ü–į, –ļ–ĺ—Ź—ā–ĺ –ļ–ĺ—Ā—ā–≤–į –ī–ĺ—Ā—ā–į –Ņ–į—Ä–ł –Ĺ–į –Ņ—Ä–į–≤–ł—ā–Ķ–Ľ—Ā—ā–≤–ĺ—ā–ĺ. –ź–ļ–ĺ –ĺ–Ī–ł—á–į—ā–Ķ –ī–į –Ņ–ł—ą–Ķ—ā–Ķ –ł–Ĺ—ā–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—Ā–Ĺ–ł –Ķ—Ā–Ķ—ā–į –ł–Ľ–ł —Ą–į–ļ—ā–ł, –ľ–ĺ–∂–Ķ –ī–į –∑–į–≤—ä—Ä—ā–ł—ā–Ķ –ĺ–ļ–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ —ā–Ķ–ľ–į—ā–į, —á–Ķ –≤ –ľ–ł–Ĺ–į–Ľ–ĺ—ā–ĺ –≤ –†—É—Ā–ł—Ź, –ļ–ĺ—Ā–ľ–ĺ–Ĺ–į–≤—ā–ł—ā–Ķ —Ā–į –Ľ–Ķ—ā–Ķ–Ľ–ł —Ā –Ņ—É—ą–ļ–ł. –©–Ķ —Ä–į–∑–Ī–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—ā–Ķ –∑–į—Č–ĺ –ĺ—ā –ī–Ĺ–Ķ—ą–Ĺ–ĺ—ā–ĺ –≤–ł–ī–Ķ–ĺ.

Steve Irwin

–ė–∑–≤–Ķ—Ā—ā–Ķ–Ĺ –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –õ–ĺ–≤–Ķ—Ü–į –Ĺ–į –ļ—Ä–ĺ–ļ–ĺ–ī–ł–Ľ–ł, –°—ā–ł–≤ –™—Ä—É–ł–Ĺ –Ī–Ķ—ą–Ķ –ł—Ā—ā–ł–Ĺ—Ā–ļ–į —Ä–ł–į–Ľ–ł—ā–ł –∑–≤–Ķ–∑–ī–į. –Ę–ĺ–∑–ł –Ņ—Ä–ł—Ä–ĺ–ī–ĺ–∑–į—Č–ł—ā–Ĺ–ł–ļ –Ĺ–ł –∑–į–Ņ–ĺ–∑–Ĺ–į —Ā –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ł –ĺ—ā –Ĺ–į–Ļ-–ĺ–Ņ–į—Ā–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ –∑–ľ–ł–ł, –Ĺ–į—Ā–Ķ–ļ–ĺ–ľ–ł –ł —Ä–ł–Ī–ł –Ĺ–į –Ņ–Ľ–į–Ĺ–Ķ—ā–į—ā–į. –ó–į—ā–ĺ–≤–į –Ī–Ķ—ą–Ķ —ą–ĺ–ļ –∑–į –≤—Ā–ł—á–ļ–ł, –ļ–ĺ–≥–į—ā–ĺ The Crocodile Hunter –≤–Ĺ–Ķ–∑–į–Ņ–Ĺ–ĺ –Ĺ–ł –Ĺ–į–Ņ—É—Ā–Ĺ–į. –ü—Ä–Ķ–∑ 2006-—ā–į –≥–ĺ–ī–ł–Ĺ–į —ā–ĺ–Ļ –Ī–Ķ—ą–Ķ —É–Ī–ĺ–ī–Ķ–Ĺ –ĺ—ā –ĺ—ā—Ä–ĺ–≤–Ĺ–ł—Ź —ą–ł–Ņ –Ĺ–į —Ā–ļ–į—ā, –ī–ĺ–ļ–į—ā–ĺ —Ā–Ķ –≥–ľ—É—Ä–ļ–į—ą–Ķ –≤ —Ä–į–Ļ–ĺ–Ĺ–į –Ĺ–į –ď–ĺ–Ľ–Ķ–ľ–ł—Ź –Ī–į—Ä–ł–Ķ—Ä–Ķ–Ĺ —Ä–ł—Ą. –Ę–ĺ–∑–ł –ł–Ĺ—Ü–ł–ī–Ķ–Ĺ—ā —Ā–Ľ–ĺ–∂–ł –ļ—Ä–į–Ļ –Ĺ–į –Ņ—Ä–ł–ļ–Ľ—é—á–Ķ–Ĺ–ł—Ź—ā–į –ľ—É, –Ĺ–ĺ –ī–Ķ–Ľ–į—ā–į –ľ—É –Ĺ–ł–ļ–ĺ–≥–į –Ĺ—Ź–ľ–į –ī–į –Ī—ä–ī–į—ā –∑–į–Ī—Ä–į–≤–Ķ–Ĺ–ł.

Steve Irwin

snippet.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
‚ÄúI crossed a line I‚Äôd never crossed in addiction.‚ÄĚ 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
If you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741

Pre-order Demi Lovato‚Äôs new album ‚ÄėDancing With The Devil‚Ä¶ The Art Of Starting Over‚Äô https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

–ź–ļ–ĺ –ľ–ĺ–∂–Ķ–ľ –∑–į –ļ—Ä–į—ā–ļ–ĺ –ī–į —Ā–Ķ –į–Ī—Ā—ā—Ä–į—Ö–ł—Ä–į–ľ–Ķ –ĺ—ā –≤—Ā–ł—á–ļ–ĺ, –ļ–ĺ–Ķ—ā–ĺ –∑–Ĺ–į–Ķ–ľ –ł –≤–ľ–Ķ –≤–ł–∂–ī–į–Ľ–ł, —Č–Ķ –∑–į–Ī–Ķ–Ľ–Ķ–∂–ł–ľ, —á–Ķ –Ņ–Ľ–į–Ĺ–Ķ—ā–į—ā–į –ó–Ķ–ľ—Ź –Ķ –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ –ī–ĺ—Ā—ā–į —Ā—ā—Ä–į–Ĺ–Ĺ–ĺ –ľ—Ź—Ā—ā–ĺ. –Ě–į –≤—Ā–ł—á–ł –ļ–ĺ–Ĺ—ā–ł–Ĺ–Ķ–Ĺ—ā–ł, –Ī–ł–Ľ–ĺ —ā–ĺ –ē–≤—Ä–ĺ–Ņ–į, –ź–ľ–Ķ—Ä–ł–ļ–į –ł–Ľ–ł –ź–≤—Ā—ā—Ä–į–Ľ–ł—Ź, –≤—Ā–Ķ —Ā–Ķ –ļ—Ä–ł–Ķ –Ņ–ĺ –Ĺ—Ź–ļ–ĺ–Ķ –Ĺ–Ķ–ĺ—á–į–ļ–≤–į–Ĺ–ĺ —á—É–ī–ĺ. –í—Ā–ł—á–ļ–ĺ –ł–∑–≥–Ľ–Ķ–∂–ī–į –Ĺ—Ź–ļ–į–ļ —á–ĺ–≤–Ķ—ą–ļ–ĺ –ł –Ņ–ĺ–∑–Ĺ–į—ā–ĺ, –Ĺ–ĺ –į–ļ–ĺ —Ā–Ķ —Ā–Ķ —Ä–į–∑—ā—ä—Ä—Ā–ł–ľ –ľ–į–Ľ–ļ–ĺ –Ņ–ĺ-–ī–ĺ–Ī—Ä–Ķ —Č–Ķ –≤–ł–ī–ł–ľ, —á–Ķ –ĺ–ļ–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ –Ĺ–į—Ā –≥—ä–ľ–∂–ł –ĺ—ā –ĺ—Ä–≥–į–Ĺ–ł–∑–ľ–ł, –Ņ–Ķ–Ļ–∑–į–∂–ł –ł —ā–≤–ĺ—Ä–Ķ–Ĺ–ł—Ź, –ļ–ĺ–ł—ā–ĺ –ł–∑–≥–Ľ–Ķ–∂–ī–į—ā –Ī—É–ļ–≤–į–Ľ–Ĺ–ĺ –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ĺ—ā –ī—Ä—É–≥–į –Ņ–Ľ–į–Ĺ–Ķ—ā–į. 

–ź–ļ–ĺ –Ĺ–Ķ –ľ–ł –≤—Ź—Ä–≤–į—ā–Ķ, –ĺ—Ā—ā–į–Ĺ–Ķ—ā–Ķ —Ā –ľ–Ķ–Ĺ –ł –ī–Ĺ–Ķ—ą–Ĺ–ĺ—ā–ĺ –≤–ł–ī–Ķ–ĺ –ī–ĺ –ļ—Ä–į—Ź –ł –≤–ł –ĺ–Ī–Ķ—Č–į–≤–į–ľ, —á–Ķ –≤ –ļ—Ä–į—Ź –Ļ —Č–Ķ –∑–į–Ņ–ĺ—á–Ĺ–Ķ—ā–Ķ –ī–į —Ā–Ķ —á—É–ī–ł—ā–Ķ –ł–ľ–į –Ľ–ł –≥—Ä–į–Ĺ–ł—Ü–į –ľ–Ķ–∂–ī—É –ł–∑–≤—ä–Ĺ–∑–Ķ–ľ–Ĺ–ĺ—ā–ĺ –ł –∑–Ķ–ľ–Ĺ–ĺ—ā–ĺ, –ł –į–ļ–ĺ –ł–ľ–į, –ļ—ä–ī–Ķ –ł–∑–ĺ–Ī—Č–ĺ –Ķ —ā—Ź. –ź–∑ —Ā—ä–ľ –°–Ľ–į–≤–ł –ĺ—ā The Clashers –ł –ī–Ĺ–Ķ—Ā —Č–Ķ –≤–ł –Ņ–ĺ–ļ–į–∂–į 10 –Ņ—Ä–ł—Ä–ĺ–ī–Ĺ–ł —ā–≤–ĺ—Ä–Ķ–Ĺ–ł—Ź, –ļ–ĺ–ł—ā–ĺ –ł–∑–≥–Ľ–Ķ–∂–ī–į—ā –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ĺ—ā –ī—Ä—É–≥–į –Ņ–Ľ–į–Ĺ–Ķ—ā–į.

–ó–į–Ņ–ĺ—á–≤–į–ľ–Ķ –ī–Ĺ–Ķ—ą–Ĺ–į—ā–į the clashers –ļ–Ľ–į—Ā–į—Ü–ł—Ź —Ā –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ –Ņ—ä—ā—É–≤–į–Ĺ–Ķ –ī–ĺ –ľ–ĺ—Ä—Ā–ļ–ł—ā–Ķ –ī—ä–Ľ–Ī–ł–Ĺ–ł –ł –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ —Ā—ä–∑–ī–į–Ĺ–ł–Ķ, –ļ–ĺ–Ķ—ā–ĺ –Ī—É–ļ–≤–į–Ľ–Ĺ–ĺ —Ā—ā–į–≤–į –Ĺ–Ķ–≤–ł–ī–ł–ľ–ĺ. –ú–į–ļ–į—Ä –ī–į –Ĺ–ĺ—Ā–ł –ł–ľ–Ķ—ā–ĺ –Ĺ–į —Ā–ļ—ä–Ņ–ĺ—Ü–Ķ–Ĺ–Ķ–Ĺ –ļ–į–ľ—ä–ļ, —ā–į–∑–ł –Ī—É–Ī–ĺ–Ľ–Ķ—á–ļ–į –Ķ –Ĺ–į–Ņ—Ä–į–≤–ĺ –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ĺ—ā –ī—Ä—É–≥–į –Ņ–Ľ–į–Ĺ–Ķ—ā–į. –ú–ĺ—Ä—Ā–ļ–ł—Ź—ā —Ā–į–Ņ—Ą–ł—Ä e –≤–ł–ī —Ü–ł–ļ–Ľ–ĺ–Ņ—Ā, —Ä–ĺ–ī–Ĺ–ł–Ĺ–į –Ĺ–į —á–Ľ–Ķ–Ĺ–Ķ—Ā—ā–ĺ–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ł—ā–Ķ, –į –≥—ä—Ä–Ī—ä—ā –ľ—É –Ķ –Ņ–ĺ–ļ—Ä–ł—ā —Ā —ą–Ķ—Ā—ā–ĺ—ä–≥—ä–Ľ–Ĺ–ł –ļ—Ä–ł—Ā—ā–į–Ľ–ł, —Ä–į–∑—Ā—ā–ĺ—Ź–Ĺ–ł–Ķ—ā–ĺ –ľ–Ķ–∂–ī—É –ļ–ĺ–ł—ā–ĺ –Ķ —Ä–į–≤–Ĺ–ĺ –Ĺ–į –ī—ä–Ľ–∂–ł–Ĺ–į—ā–į –Ĺ–į —Ā–ł–Ĺ—Ź—ā–į —Ā–≤–Ķ—ā–Ľ–ł–Ĺ–į. –ö–ĺ–≥–į—ā–ĺ –ļ—Ä–ł—Ā—ā–į–Ľ–ł—ā–Ķ —Ā—Ä–Ķ—Č–Ĺ–į—ā —Ā–Ľ—ä–Ĺ—á–Ķ–≤–ł—ā–Ķ –Ľ—ä—á–ł, —ā–Ķ –ĺ—ā—Ä–į–∑—Ź–≤–į—ā —Ā–≤–Ķ—ā–Ľ–ł–Ĺ–į—ā–į –≤ –ľ–ł—Ā—ā–Ķ—Ä–ł–ĺ–∑–Ĺ–ł –ł —Ä–į–∑–Ľ–ł—á–Ĺ–ł –Ņ–ĺ —Ü–≤—Ź—ā –ĺ—ā–Ķ–Ĺ—ä—Ü–ł. –°–Ľ–Ķ–ī —ā–ĺ–≤–į –Ĺ–į—ą–Ķ—ā–ĺ –Ņ—ä—ā–Ķ—ą–Ķ—Ā—ā–≤–ł–Ķ –Ĺ–ł –ĺ—ā–≤–Ķ–∂–ī–į –≤ —Ā–≤–Ķ—ā–į –Ĺ–į —Ö–ł–ľ–ł—Ź—ā–į, –≤ –ļ–ĺ–Ļ—ā–ĺ —Č–Ķ –≤–ł –Ņ–ĺ–ļ–į–∂–į –Ķ–ī–ł–Ĺ –ľ–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –ł–Ĺ—ā–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—Ā–Ķ–Ĺ –ľ–Ķ—ā–į–Ľ - –Ď–ł—Ā–ľ—É—ā. –Ď–ł—Ā–ľ—É—ā—ä—ā –Ķ –ľ–Ķ—ā–į–Ľ, –ļ–ĺ–Ļ—ā–ĺ —Ā–Ķ —ā–ĺ–Ņ–ł –Ņ—Ä–ł –ľ–į–Ľ–ļ–ĺ –Ĺ–į–ī 271 –≥—Ä–į–ī—É—Ā–į –Ņ–ĺ –¶–Ķ–Ľ–∑–ł–Ļ. –ü—Ä–ł –ł–∑—Ā—ā–ł–≤–į–Ĺ–Ķ—ā–ĺ –ľ—É –≤ –Ĺ–Ķ–≥–ĺ —Ā–Ķ —Ą–ĺ—Ä–ľ–ł—Ä–į—ā –ļ—Ä–ł—Ā—ā–į–Ľ–ł —Ā –į–ī—Ā–ļ–ł —á—É–ī–į—ā–ł —Ą–ĺ—Ä–ľ–ł, –į –Ņ—Ä–ł –ļ–ĺ–Ĺ—ā–į–ļ—ā —Ā –ļ–ł—Ā–Ľ–ĺ—Ä–ĺ–ī —Ą–ĺ—Ä–ľ–ł—ā–Ķ —Ā–Ķ –ĺ—Ü–≤–Ķ—ā—Ź–≤–į—ā –≤ —Ä–į–∑–Ľ–ł—á–Ĺ–ł —Ü–≤–Ķ—ā–ĺ–≤–Ķ. –Ě—Ź–ľ–į –ļ–į–ļ –ī–į –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–Ņ—É—Ā–Ĺ–Ķ–ľ –ł –°–ź–© (USA), –Ņ–ĺ-—ā–ĺ—á–Ĺ–ĺ —Č–į—ā–į –Ě–Ķ–≤–į–ī–į (Nevada), –ļ—ä–ī–Ķ—ā–ĺ —Ā–Ķ —Ā–Ņ–ĺ—ā–į–Ļ–≤–į –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–į –ł–Ĺ—ā–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—Ā–Ĺ–į —ā—É—Ä–ł—Ā—ā–ł—á–Ķ—Ā–ļ–į –∑–Ķ–Ī–Ķ–Ľ–Ķ–∂–ł—ā–Ķ–Ľ–Ĺ–ĺ—Ā—ā. –õ–Ķ—ā—Ź—Č–ł—Ź—ā –≥–Ķ–Ļ–∑–Ķ—Ä —Ā–Ķ –Ņ–ĺ—Ź–≤—Ź–≤–į –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–∑ 1916 –≥. –Ņ—Ä–ł –ĺ–Ņ–ł—ā –ī–į —Ā–Ķ –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–ļ–ĺ–Ņ–į–Ķ –ļ–Ľ–į–ī–Ķ–Ĺ–Ķ—Ü. –ě–ļ–į–∑–≤–į —Ā–Ķ –ĺ–Ī–į—á–Ķ, —á–Ķ —ā–ĺ—á–Ĺ–ĺ —ā–į–ľ –Ĺ–į–ī—ä–Ľ–Ī–ĺ–ļ–ĺ –≤ –∑–Ķ–ľ—Ź—ā–į —ā–Ķ—á–Ķ –Ľ–į–≤–į, –ļ–ĺ—Ź—ā–ĺ –∑–į–≥—Ä—Ź–≤–į –Ņ–ĺ–ī–Ņ–ĺ—á–≤–Ķ–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ –≤–ĺ–ī–ł –Ĺ–į–ī –Ĺ–Ķ—Ź. –°–Ľ–Ķ–ī –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ĺ—ā –ļ–Ľ–į–ī–Ķ–Ĺ–Ķ—Ü–į –∑–į–Ņ–ĺ—á–Ĺ–į–Ľ–į –ī–į –ł–∑–Ľ–ł–∑–į –≤–ĺ–ī–į –Ņ—Ä–ł –Ī–Ľ–ł–∑–ĺ 100 –≥—Ä–į–ī—É—Ā–į –Ņ–ĺ –¶–Ķ–Ľ–∑–ł–Ļ, –ļ–ĺ–Ņ–į—á–ł—ā–Ķ –≥–ĺ –∑–į—Ä—Ź–∑–į–Ľ–ł, –į –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–∑ –≥–ĺ–ī–ł–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ –∑–į–Ņ–ĺ—á–Ĺ–į–Ľ–ł –ī–į —Ā–Ķ —Ā—ä–∑–ī–į–≤–į—ā —ā–Ķ–∑–ł –ł–∑–≤—ä–Ĺ–∑–Ķ–ľ–Ĺ–ł —Ą–ĺ—Ä–ľ–ł. –Ę–Ķ–∑–ł, –ļ–į–ļ—ā–ĺ –ł –ī—Ä—É–≥–ł –ł–Ĺ—ā–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—Ā–Ĺ–ł –ľ–Ķ—Ā—ā–į —Č–Ķ –≤–ł–ī–ł—ā–Ķ –≤ –Ĺ–ĺ–≤–į—ā–į —ā–ĺ–Ņ 10 –ļ–Ľ–į—Ā–į—Ü–ł—Ź –Ĺ–į The Clashers.

–í—Ä–Ķ–ľ–Ķ –Ķ –ī–į —ā–Ķ—Ā—ā–≤–į–ľ –ĺ—á–ł—ā–Ķ –≤–ł —Ā –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ –ľ–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –ł–Ĺ—ā–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—Ā–Ĺ–ĺ —Ā—ä–∑–ī–į–Ĺ–ł–Ķ - –ľ–ĺ—Ä—Ā–ļ–į –Ľ–ł–Ľ–ł—Ź. –ü–ĺ–∑–Ĺ–į—ā–ĺ –ł–ľ–Ķ, –Ĺ–ĺ –Ĺ–Ķ –Ī—ä—Ä–∑–į–Ļ—ā–Ķ. –Ę–ĺ–≤–į –Ĺ–Ķ –Ķ —Ä–į—Ā—ā–Ķ–Ĺ–ł–Ķ. –ü–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—Ā—ā–į—ā–į –Ľ–ł–Ľ–ł—Ź –Ķ —Ā—Ä–Ķ–ī –Ĺ–į–Ļ-—Ā—ā—Ä–į–Ĺ–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ –ĺ—ā —ā—Ź—Ö –ł –ł–∑–≥–Ľ–Ķ–∂–ī–į –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ľ—É—ā–ł—Ä–į–Ľ –≤–ł–ī –ĺ—ā –Ĺ–į—É—á–Ĺ–ĺ-—Ą–į–Ĺ—ā–į—Ā—ā–ł—á–Ķ–Ĺ —Ą–ł–Ľ–ľ. –°—ä—Č–ĺ –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ł–∑–≤—ä–Ĺ–∑–Ķ–ľ–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ, –Ľ–ł–Ľ–ł—Ź—ā–į –∂–ł–≤–Ķ–Ķ –ī–į–Ľ–Ķ—á –ĺ—ā —Ö–ĺ—Ä—Ā–ļ–ł—ā–Ķ –ĺ—á–ł –Ņ—Ä–ł –ī—ä–Ľ–Ī–ĺ—á–ł–Ĺ–ł, –ī–ĺ—Ā—ā–ł–≥–į—Č–ł –ī–ĺ 9000 –ľ–Ķ—ā—Ä–į. –°–Ľ–Ķ–ī–≤–į—Č–į—ā–į —Ā–Ņ–ł—Ä–ļ–į –≤ –Ĺ–į—ą–Ķ—ā–ĺ –Ņ—ä—ā—É–≤–į–Ĺ–Ķ —Ā–į –§–ł–Ľ–ł–Ņ–ł–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ. –ē–ī–Ĺ–į –Ņ—Ä–ł–ļ–į–∑–Ĺ–į –ī—ä—Ä–∂–į–≤–į, —Ä–į–∑–Ņ–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ–∂–Ķ–Ĺ–į –Ĺ–į –Ĺ—Ź–ļ–ĺ–Ľ–ļ–ĺ —á–į—Ā–į –Ņ–ĺ–Ľ–Ķ—ā —Ā—ä—Ā —Ā–į–ľ–ĺ–Ľ–Ķ—ā. –ü—Ä–Ķ–∑ –Ľ–Ķ—ā–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ –ľ–Ķ—Ā–Ķ—Ü–ł —ā–Ķ–∑–ł —ą–ĺ–ļ–ĺ–Ľ–į–ī–ĺ–≤–ł —Ö—ä–Ľ–ľ–ĺ–≤–Ķ –Ņ—Ä–ł–ī–ĺ–Ī–ł–≤–į—ā –≤–ł–ī–į –Ĺ–į –ĺ–≥—Ä–ĺ–ľ–Ĺ–ł –ļ—É–Ņ—á–ł–Ĺ–ł —ą–ĺ–ļ–ĺ–Ľ–į–ī. –ú—Ź—Ā—ā–ĺ—ā–ĺ –ł–∑–≥–Ľ–Ķ–∂–ī–į –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ĺ—ā –ī—Ä—É–≥–į –Ņ–Ľ–į–Ĺ–Ķ—ā–į –ł –Ĺ–į–ļ—ä–ī–Ķ—ā–ĺ –ł –ī–į –Ņ–ĺ–≥–Ľ–Ķ–ī–Ĺ–Ķ—ą –≤–ł–∂–ī–į—ą —Ā–į–ľ–ĺ —ā–ĺ–≤–į - –ó–į–Ņ–ĺ—á–≤–į–ľ–Ķ –ī–Ĺ–Ķ—ą–Ĺ–į—ā–į the clashers –ļ–Ľ–į—Ā–į—Ü–ł—Ź —Ā –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ –Ņ—ä—ā—É–≤–į–Ĺ–Ķ –ī–ĺ –ľ–ĺ—Ä—Ā–ļ–ł—ā–Ķ –ī—ä–Ľ–Ī–ł–Ĺ–ł –ł –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ —Ā—ä–∑–ī–į–Ĺ–ł–Ķ, –ļ–ĺ–Ķ—ā–ĺ –Ī—É–ļ–≤–į–Ľ–Ĺ–ĺ —Ā—ā–į–≤–į –Ĺ–Ķ–≤–ł–ī–ł–ľ–ĺ. –ú–į–ļ–į—Ä –ī–į –Ĺ–ĺ—Ā–ł –ł–ľ–Ķ—ā–ĺ –Ĺ–į —Ā–ļ—ä–Ņ–ĺ—Ü–Ķ–Ĺ–Ķ–Ĺ –ļ–į–ľ—ä–ļ, —ā–į–∑–ł –Ī—É–Ī–ĺ–Ľ–Ķ—á–ļ–į –Ķ –Ĺ–į–Ņ—Ä–į–≤–ĺ –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ĺ—ā –ī—Ä—É–≥–į –Ņ–Ľ–į–Ĺ–Ķ—ā–į. –ú–ĺ—Ä—Ā–ļ–ł—Ź—ā —Ā–į–Ņ—Ą–ł—Ä e –≤–ł–ī —Ü–ł–ļ–Ľ–ĺ–Ņ—Ā, —Ä–ĺ–ī–Ĺ–ł–Ĺ–į –Ĺ–į —á–Ľ–Ķ–Ĺ–Ķ—Ā—ā–ĺ–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ł—ā–Ķ, –į –≥—ä—Ä–Ī—ä—ā –ľ—É –Ķ –Ņ–ĺ–ļ—Ä–ł—ā —Ā —ą–Ķ—Ā—ā–ĺ—ä–≥—ä–Ľ–Ĺ–ł –ļ—Ä–ł—Ā—ā–į–Ľ–ł, —Ä–į–∑—Ā—ā–ĺ—Ź–Ĺ–ł–Ķ—ā–ĺ –ľ–Ķ–∂–ī—É –ļ–ĺ–ł—ā–ĺ –Ķ —Ä–į–≤–Ĺ–ĺ –Ĺ–į –ī—ä–Ľ–∂–ł–Ĺ–į—ā–į –Ĺ–į —Ā–ł–Ĺ—Ź—ā–į —Ā–≤–Ķ—ā–Ľ–ł–Ĺ–į. –ö–ĺ–≥–į—ā–ĺ –ļ—Ä–ł—Ā—ā–į–Ľ–ł—ā–Ķ —Ā—Ä–Ķ—Č–Ĺ–į—ā —Ā–Ľ—ä–Ĺ—á–Ķ–≤–ł—ā–Ķ –Ľ—ä—á–ł, —ā–Ķ –ĺ—ā—Ä–į–∑—Ź–≤–į—ā —Ā–≤–Ķ—ā–Ľ–ł–Ĺ–į—ā–į –≤ –ľ–ł—Ā—ā–Ķ—Ä–ł–ĺ–∑–Ĺ–ł –ł —Ä–į–∑–Ľ–ł—á–Ĺ–ł –Ņ–ĺ —Ü–≤—Ź—ā –ĺ—ā–Ķ–Ĺ—ä—Ü–ł. –°–Ľ–Ķ–ī —ā–ĺ–≤–į –Ĺ–į—ą–Ķ—ā–ĺ –Ņ—ä—ā–Ķ—ą–Ķ—Ā—ā–≤–ł–Ķ –Ĺ–ł –ĺ—ā–≤–Ķ–∂–ī–į –≤ —Ā–≤–Ķ—ā–į –Ĺ–į —Ö–ł–ľ–ł—Ź—ā–į, –≤ –ļ–ĺ–Ļ—ā–ĺ —Č–Ķ –≤–ł –Ņ–ĺ–ļ–į–∂–į –Ķ–ī–ł–Ĺ –ľ–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –ł–Ĺ—ā–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—Ā–Ķ–Ĺ –ľ–Ķ—ā–į–Ľ - –Ď–ł—Ā–ľ—É—ā. –Ď–ł—Ā–ľ—É—ā—ä—ā –Ķ –ľ–Ķ—ā–į–Ľ, –ļ–ĺ–Ļ—ā–ĺ —Ā–Ķ —ā–ĺ–Ņ–ł –Ņ—Ä–ł –ľ–į–Ľ–ļ–ĺ –Ĺ–į–ī 271 –≥—Ä–į–ī—É—Ā–į –Ņ–ĺ –¶–Ķ–Ľ–∑–ł–Ļ. –ü—Ä–ł –ł–∑—Ā—ā–ł–≤–į–Ĺ–Ķ—ā–ĺ –ľ—É –≤ –Ĺ–Ķ–≥–ĺ —Ā–Ķ —Ą–ĺ—Ä–ľ–ł—Ä–į—ā –ļ—Ä–ł—Ā—ā–į–Ľ–ł —Ā –į–ī—Ā–ļ–ł —á—É–ī–į—ā–ł —Ą–ĺ—Ä–ľ–ł, –į –Ņ—Ä–ł –ļ–ĺ–Ĺ—ā–į–ļ—ā —Ā –ļ–ł—Ā–Ľ–ĺ—Ä–ĺ–ī —Ą–ĺ—Ä–ľ–ł—ā–Ķ —Ā–Ķ –ĺ—Ü–≤–Ķ—ā—Ź–≤–į—ā –≤ —Ä–į–∑–Ľ–ł—á–Ĺ–ł —Ü–≤–Ķ—ā–ĺ–≤–Ķ. –Ě—Ź–ľ–į –ļ–į–ļ –ī–į –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–Ņ—É—Ā–Ĺ–Ķ–ľ –ł –°–ź–© (USA), –Ņ–ĺ-—ā–ĺ—á–Ĺ–ĺ —Č–į—ā–į –Ě–Ķ–≤–į–ī–į (Nevada), –ļ—ä–ī–Ķ—ā–ĺ —Ā–Ķ —Ā–Ņ–ĺ—ā–į–Ļ–≤–į –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–į –ł–Ĺ—ā–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—Ā–Ĺ–į —ā—É—Ä–ł—Ā—ā–ł—á–Ķ—Ā–ļ–į –∑–Ķ–Ī–Ķ–Ľ–Ķ–∂–ł—ā–Ķ–Ľ–Ĺ–ĺ—Ā—ā. –õ–Ķ—ā—Ź—Č–ł—Ź—ā –≥–Ķ–Ļ–∑–Ķ—Ä —Ā–Ķ –Ņ–ĺ—Ź–≤—Ź–≤–į –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–∑ 1916 –≥. –Ņ—Ä–ł –ĺ–Ņ–ł—ā –ī–į —Ā–Ķ –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–ļ–ĺ–Ņ–į–Ķ –ļ–Ľ–į–ī–Ķ–Ĺ–Ķ—Ü. –ě–ļ–į–∑–≤–į —Ā–Ķ –ĺ–Ī–į—á–Ķ, —á–Ķ —ā–ĺ—á–Ĺ–ĺ —ā–į–ľ –Ĺ–į–ī—ä–Ľ–Ī–ĺ–ļ–ĺ –≤ –∑–Ķ–ľ—Ź—ā–į —ā–Ķ—á–Ķ –Ľ–į–≤–į, –ļ–ĺ—Ź—ā–ĺ –∑–į–≥—Ä—Ź–≤–į –Ņ–ĺ–ī–Ņ–ĺ—á–≤–Ķ–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ –≤–ĺ–ī–ł –Ĺ–į–ī –Ĺ–Ķ—Ź. –°–Ľ–Ķ–ī –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ĺ—ā –ļ–Ľ–į–ī–Ķ–Ĺ–Ķ—Ü–į –∑–į–Ņ–ĺ—á–Ĺ–į–Ľ–į –ī–į –ł–∑–Ľ–ł–∑–į –≤–ĺ–ī–į –Ņ—Ä–ł –Ī–Ľ–ł–∑–ĺ 100 –≥—Ä–į–ī—É—Ā–į –Ņ–ĺ –¶–Ķ–Ľ–∑–ł–Ļ, –ļ–ĺ–Ņ–į—á–ł—ā–Ķ –≥–ĺ –∑–į—Ä—Ź–∑–į–Ľ–ł, –į –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–∑ –≥–ĺ–ī–ł–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ –∑–į–Ņ–ĺ—á–Ĺ–į–Ľ–ł –ī–į —Ā–Ķ —Ā—ä–∑–ī–į–≤–į—ā —ā–Ķ–∑–ł –ł–∑–≤—ä–Ĺ–∑–Ķ–ľ–Ĺ–ł —Ą–ĺ—Ä–ľ–ł. –Ę–Ķ–∑–ł, –ļ–į–ļ—ā–ĺ –ł –ī—Ä—É–≥–ł –ł–Ĺ—ā–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—Ā–Ĺ–ł –ľ–Ķ—Ā—ā–į —Č–Ķ –≤–ł–ī–ł—ā–Ķ –≤ –Ĺ–ĺ–≤–į—ā–į —ā–ĺ–Ņ 10 –ļ–Ľ–į—Ā–į—Ü–ł—Ź –Ĺ–į The Clashers.

–í—Ä–Ķ–ľ–Ķ –Ķ –ī–į —ā–Ķ—Ā—ā–≤–į–ľ –ĺ—á–ł—ā–Ķ –≤–ł —Ā –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ –ľ–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –ł–Ĺ—ā–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—Ā–Ĺ–ĺ —Ā—ä–∑–ī–į–Ĺ–ł–Ķ - –ľ–ĺ—Ä—Ā–ļ–į –Ľ–ł–Ľ–ł—Ź. –ü–ĺ–∑–Ĺ–į—ā–ĺ –ł–ľ–Ķ, –Ĺ–ĺ –Ĺ–Ķ –Ī—ä—Ä–∑–į–Ļ—ā–Ķ. –Ę–ĺ–≤–į –Ĺ–Ķ –Ķ —Ä–į—Ā—ā–Ķ–Ĺ–ł–Ķ. –ü–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—Ā—ā–į—ā–į –Ľ–ł–Ľ–ł—Ź –Ķ —Ā—Ä–Ķ–ī –Ĺ–į–Ļ-—Ā—ā—Ä–į–Ĺ–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ –ĺ—ā —ā—Ź—Ö –ł –ł–∑–≥–Ľ–Ķ–∂–ī–į –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ľ—É—ā–ł—Ä–į–Ľ –≤–ł–ī –ĺ—ā –Ĺ–į—É—á–Ĺ–ĺ-—Ą–į–Ĺ—ā–į—Ā—ā–ł—á–Ķ–Ĺ —Ą–ł–Ľ–ľ. –°—ä—Č–ĺ –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ł–∑–≤—ä–Ĺ–∑–Ķ–ľ–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ, –Ľ–ł–Ľ–ł—Ź—ā–į –∂–ł–≤–Ķ–Ķ –ī–į–Ľ–Ķ—á –ĺ—ā —Ö–ĺ—Ä—Ā–ļ–ł—ā–Ķ –ĺ—á–ł –Ņ—Ä–ł –ī—ä–Ľ–Ī–ĺ—á–ł–Ĺ–ł, –ī–ĺ—Ā—ā–ł–≥–į—Č–ł –ī–ĺ 9000 –ľ–Ķ—ā—Ä–į. –°–Ľ–Ķ–ī–≤–į—Č–į—ā–į —Ā–Ņ–ł—Ä–ļ–į –≤ –Ĺ–į—ą–Ķ—ā–ĺ –Ņ—ä—ā—É–≤–į–Ĺ–Ķ —Ā–į –§–ł–Ľ–ł–Ņ–ł–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ. –ē–ī–Ĺ–į –Ņ—Ä–ł–ļ–į–∑–Ĺ–į –ī—ä—Ä–∂–į–≤–į, —Ä–į–∑–Ņ–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ–∂–Ķ–Ĺ–į –Ĺ–į –Ĺ—Ź–ļ–ĺ–Ľ–ļ–ĺ —á–į—Ā–į –Ņ–ĺ–Ľ–Ķ—ā —Ā—ä—Ā —Ā–į–ľ–ĺ–Ľ–Ķ—ā. –ü—Ä–Ķ–∑ –Ľ–Ķ—ā–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ –ľ–Ķ—Ā–Ķ—Ü–ł —ā–Ķ–∑–ł —ą–ĺ–ļ–ĺ–Ľ–į–ī–ĺ–≤–ł —Ö—ä–Ľ–ľ–ĺ–≤–Ķ –Ņ—Ä–ł–ī–ĺ–Ī–ł–≤–į—ā –≤–ł–ī–į –Ĺ–į –ĺ–≥—Ä–ĺ–ľ–Ĺ–ł –ļ—É–Ņ—á–ł–Ĺ–ł —ą–ĺ–ļ–ĺ–Ľ–į–ī. –ú—Ź—Ā—ā–ĺ—ā–ĺ –ł–∑–≥–Ľ–Ķ–∂–ī–į –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ĺ—ā –ī—Ä—É–≥–į –Ņ–Ľ–į–Ĺ–Ķ—ā–į –ł –Ĺ–į–ļ—ä–ī–Ķ—ā–ĺ –ł –ī–į –Ņ–ĺ–≥–Ľ–Ķ–ī–Ĺ–Ķ—ą –≤–ł–∂–ī–į—ą —Ā–į–ľ–ĺ —ā–ĺ–≤–į - –Ĺ–į–ī 1000 —Ö—ä–Ľ–ľ–į –ĺ—ā —ą–ĺ–ļ–ĺ–Ľ–į–ī. –Ě—Ź–ľ–į –ļ–į–ļ –ī–į –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–Ņ—É—Ā–Ĺ–Ķ–ľ –ł –ź–ľ–į–∑–ĺ–Ĺ–ł—Ź. –°—ā—ä–ļ–Ľ–ĺ–ļ—Ä–ł–Ľ–į—ā–į –Ņ–Ķ–Ņ–Ķ—Ä—É–ī–į –ł–∑–≥–Ľ–Ķ–∂–ī–į —Ā–≤—Ä—ä—Ö–Ķ—Ā—ā–Ķ—Ā—ā–≤–Ķ–Ĺ–ĺ, –ļ–ĺ–≥–į—ā–ĺ –Ķ –≤ –Ņ–ĺ–Ľ–Ķ—ā, –į –ļ–ĺ–≥–į—ā–ĺ –ļ–į—Ü–Ĺ–Ķ –ł —Ā—ā–ĺ–ł –Ĺ–Ķ–Ņ–ĺ–ī–≤–ł–∂–Ĺ–ĺ –≤–ł–∂–ī–į–ľ–Ķ, —á–Ķ —ā–ĺ–≤–į –Ķ –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ –ĺ—ā –Ĺ–į–Ļ-–ļ—Ä–į—Ā–ł–≤–ł—ā–Ķ –Ĺ–į—Ā–Ķ–ļ–ĺ–ľ–ł. –ö—Ä–ł–Ľ–Ķ—ā–Ķ –Ļ —Ā–į –Ņ–ĺ—á—ā–ł –Ĺ–į–Ņ—ä–Ľ–Ĺ–ĺ –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–∑—Ä–į—á–Ĺ–ł –ł –Ĺ–Ķ –ĺ—ā—Ä–į–∑—Ź–≤–į—ā —Ā–≤–Ķ—ā–Ľ–ł–Ĺ–į, –Ņ—Ä–ł–ī–į–≤–į–Ļ–ļ–ł –Ĺ–į –Ņ–Ķ–Ņ–Ķ—Ä—É–ī–į—ā–į –ľ–ł—Ā—ā–Ķ—Ä–ł–ĺ–∑–Ķ–Ĺ –ł –Ĺ–Ķ—Ä–Ķ–į–Ľ–Ķ–Ĺ –≤–ł–ī. –°—ā—ä–ļ–Ľ–ĺ–ļ—Ä–ł–Ľ–ł—ā–Ķ –Ņ–Ķ–Ņ–Ķ—Ä—É–ī–ł –Ĺ–Ķ –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–ł–∑–≤–Ķ–∂–ī–į—ā –Ņ–ł–≥–ľ–Ķ–Ĺ—ā–ł –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ĺ—Ā—ā–į–Ĺ–į–Ľ–ł—ā–Ķ —Ā–ł —Ā—ä–Ī—Ä–į—ā—Ź –ł –ĺ—ā—Ā—ā—Ä–į–Ĺ–ł –ł–∑–≥–Ľ–Ķ–∂–ī–į —Ā—Ź–ļ–į—ą –ļ—ä–ľ —ā—Ź–Ľ–ĺ—ā–ĺ –Ļ –Ķ –Ņ—Ä–ł–ļ–į—á–Ķ–Ĺ –Ķ–ļ–∑–ĺ—Ā–ļ–Ķ–Ľ–Ķ—ā, –ī–Ķ–Ľ–ĺ –Ĺ–į –ľ–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –Ņ–ĺ-–Ĺ–į–Ņ—Ä–Ķ–ī–Ĺ–į–Ľ –≤–ł–ī –ł–Ľ–ł —ā–Ķ—Ö–Ĺ–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ–≥–ł—Ź. –í—Ä—ä—Č–į–ľ–Ķ —Ā–Ķ –ĺ–Ī—Ä–į—ā–Ĺ–ĺ –≤ –°–ź–© (USA), –ļ—ä–ī–Ķ—ā–ĺ —Č–Ķ –≤–ł –Ņ–ĺ–ļ–į–∂–į –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–į –ī—Ä—É–≥–į –į—ā—Ä–į–ļ—Ü–ł—Ź. –Ę–į–ļ–į –ł–∑–≤–Ķ—Ā—ā–Ĺ–į—ā–į ‚Äě–í—ä–Ľ–Ĺ–į‚Äú –ł–Ľ–ł The Wave –≤ –ļ–į–Ĺ—Ć–ĺ–Ĺ–į Ko–Ļo—ā –Ď—é—ā –≤ –ź—Ä–ł–∑–ĺ–Ĺ–į –Ķ –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ –ĺ—ā –Ĺ–į–Ļ-–Ĺ–Ķ—Ä–Ķ–į–Ľ–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ –ł –ī—Ä–Ķ–≤–Ĺ–ł –≥–Ķ–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ–∂–ļ–ł –ĺ–Ī—Ä–į–∑—É–≤–į–Ĺ–ł—Ź –Ĺ–į –ó–Ķ–ľ—Ź—ā–į –ł –Ľ–Ķ—Ā–Ĺ–ĺ –ľ–ĺ–∂–Ķ –ī–į –Ī—ä–ī–Ķ —Ā–Ī—ä—Ä–ļ–į–Ĺ–ĺ —Ā –≥–Ľ–Ķ–ī–ļ–į –ĺ—ā –ī—Ä—É–≥ —Ā–≤—Ź—ā.

–°–Ľ–Ķ–ī–≤–į –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ —Ä–į—Ā—ā–Ķ–Ĺ–ł–Ķ, –Ĺ–ĺ –ĺ—ā–Ĺ–ĺ–≤–ĺ –Ĺ–Ķ–ĺ–Ī–ł–ļ–Ĺ–ĺ–≤–Ķ–Ĺ–ĺ. –í–ł–ļ—ā–ĺ—Ä–ł—Ź –į–ľ–į–∑–ĺ–Ĺ–ł–ļ–į –ł–∑–≥–Ľ–Ķ–∂–ī–į –ļ–į—ā–ĺ –ľ–ĺ—ā–ł–≤ –ĺ—ā –ī–Ķ—ā—Ā–ļ–į –Ņ—Ä–ł–ļ–į–∑–ļ–į, –ļ–ĺ–Ļ—ā–ĺ –Ņ–ĺ–∑–≤–ĺ–Ľ—Ź–≤–į –Ĺ–į –≥–Ķ—Ä–ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ –ī–į –≤—ä—Ä–≤—Ź—ā –Ņ–ĺ –≤–ĺ–ī–į. –Ę–ĺ–≤–į –≤—Ā—ä—Č–Ĺ–ĺ—Ā—ā –Ķ –Ĺ–į–Ņ—ä–Ľ–Ĺ–ĺ —Ä–Ķ–į–Ľ–Ĺ–ĺ —Ä–į—Ā—ā–Ķ–Ĺ–ł–Ķ, –ļ–ĺ–Ķ—ā–ĺ –ī–Ķ–Ļ—Ā—ā–≤–ł—ā–Ķ–Ľ–Ĺ–ĺ –ľ–ĺ–∂–Ķ –ī–į –Ĺ–ł –Ņ–ĺ–∑–≤–ĺ–Ľ–ł –ī–į –≤—ä—Ä–≤–ł–ľ –Ņ–ĺ –≤–ĺ–ī–į, –Ĺ–ĺ —Ā–į–ľ–ĺ –į–ļ–ĺ —ā–Ķ–∂–ł–ľ –ī–ĺ –ĺ–ļ–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ 30 –ļ–ł–Ľ–ĺ–≥—Ä–į–ľ–į. –ė—Ā–Ņ–į–Ĺ—Ā–ļ–ł—Ź—ā —ą–į–Ľ –Ķ –ľ–ĺ–∂–Ķ –Ī–ł –Ķ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ –ĺ—ā –Ĺ–į–Ļ-–Ĺ–Ķ—Ä–Ķ–į–Ľ–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ –ł –ļ–ĺ—Ā–ľ–ł—á–Ķ—Ā–ļ–ł –ł–∑–≥–Ľ–Ķ–∂–ī–į—Č–ł —Ā—ä–∑–ī–į–Ĺ–ł—Ź, –ļ–ĺ–ł—ā–ĺ –∑–Ķ–ľ–Ĺ–į—ā–į –Ņ—Ä–ł—Ä–ĺ–ī–į –Ķ —Ä–į–∂–ī–į–Ľ–į. –ö–į–ļ—ā–ĺ —Ā–ł–≥—É—Ä–Ĺ–ĺ —Ā–Ķ –ī–ĺ—Ā–Ķ—ā–ł—Ö—ā–Ķ, —ā–ĺ–≤–į –Ĺ–Ķ –Ķ —ą–į–Ľ, –į –≤–ł–ī –ľ–ĺ—Ä—Ā–ļ–ł –ĺ—Ö–Ľ—é–≤, –ļ–ĺ–Ļ—ā–ĺ –ł–ľ–į –Ľ–ł–Ľ–į–≤–ĺ —ā—Ź–Ľ–ĺ –ł –ĺ—Ä–į–Ĺ–∂–Ķ–≤–ł —ą–ł–Ņ–ĺ–≤–Ķ –Ņ–ĺ –≥—ä—Ä–Ī–į —Ā–ł. –ó–į —Ą–ł–Ĺ–į–Ľ —Č–Ķ –≤–ł –ĺ—ā–≤–Ķ–ī–į –Ĺ–į —ā–į–ļ–ł–≤–į –Ņ—Ä–ł–ļ–į–∑–Ĺ–ł –≥–Ľ–Ķ–ī–ļ–ł, —á–Ķ –Ĺ—Ź–ľ–į –ī–į –ľ–ĺ–∂–Ķ –ī–į –Ņ–ĺ–≤—Ź—Ä–≤–į—ā–Ķ. –Ę–ĺ–≤–į –Ķ Zhangjiajie –≤ –ö–ł—ā–į–Ļ. –í –ß–∂–į–Ĺ—Ü–∑—Ź—Ü–∑–Ķ —Ā–Ķ –Ĺ–į–ľ–ł—Ä–į –ł –Ĺ–į–Ļ-–≤–ł—Ā–ĺ–ļ–ł—Ź—ā –ł –ī—ä–Ľ—ä–≥ —Ā—ā—ä–ļ–Ľ–Ķ–Ĺ –ľ–ĺ—Ā—ā –≤ —Ā–≤–Ķ—ā–į —Ā –ī—ä–Ľ–∂–ł–Ĺ–į –ĺ—ā 430 –ľ–Ķ—ā—Ä–į –ł —Ä–į–∑–Ņ–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ–∂–Ķ–Ĺ –Ĺ–į –≤–ł—Ā–ĺ—á–ł–Ĺ–į –ĺ—ā 300 –ľ–Ķ—ā—Ä–į.

–Ě–į–ī—Ź–≤–į–ľ —Ā–Ķ –ļ–Ľ–į—Ā–į—Ü–ł—Ź—ā–į –ī–į –≤–ł –Ķ —Ö–į—Ä–Ķ—Ā–į–Ľ–į. –ě—Ā—ā–į–≤–Ķ—ā–Ķ –Ņ–ĺ –Ķ–ī–ł–Ĺ –Ľ–į–Ļ–ļ!

snippet.title: 33 Useful Life Hacks For Smart PARENTS
snippet.description:
If your kids have been giving you a hard time lately, we sympathize with you. Being a parent is not an easy task, but it‚Äôs so rewarding! So, today we have some hacks we want to share with you to give you a helping hand. You‚Äôll learn a few quick fixes for everyday problems, DIY versions of necessary devices, and cute ideas for outfits. Toddlers can be sneaky and quick, so we have a DIY playpen you can use to keep them in one place while during playtime.

Not knowing what to wear can be a huge time-drainer. So we‚Äôll show you an awesome hack to help you save time when getting your little ones ready. No baby monitor? No problem! You can use your tablet and your phone to set up a monitoring system to keep an eye on your kiddos. Ironing mishaps can happen you anyone, but that burned shirt might make a great kiddie apron!

localized.title: 33 Useful Life Hacks For Smart PARENTS
localized.description:
If your kids have been giving you a hard time lately, we sympathize with you. Being a parent is not an easy task, but it‚Äôs so rewarding! So, today we have some hacks we want to share with you to give you a helping hand. You‚Äôll learn a few quick fixes for everyday problems, DIY versions of necessary devices, and cute ideas for outfits. Toddlers can be sneaky and quick, so we have a DIY playpen you can use to keep them in one place while during playtime.

Not knowing what to wear can be a huge time-drainer. So we‚Äôll show you an awesome hack to help you save time when getting your little ones ready. No baby monitor? No problem! You can use your tablet and your phone to set up a monitoring system to keep an eye on your kiddos. Ironing mishaps can happen you anyone, but that burned shirt might make a great kiddie apron!

TIMESTAMPS:

4:43 ‚Äď Outfit organizer

Sinan Zeynep'e duyduńüu b√ľy√ľk aŇük y√ľz√ľnden iŇüinden oldu.

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and Harry‚Äôs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines won‚Äôt be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

https://www.youtube.com/user/CBCTheNational?sub_confirmation=1

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
Music‚Äôs Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee Jhen√© Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, s√§je, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); s√§je for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

snippet.title: The Rise of Faceless Creators
snippet.description:
YouTube's top performers in the past couple of years have had a very intriguing common feature - they are faceless. Whether it's Dream, Corpse Husband, the VTuber community, and many more - it seems like keeping the mystery and protecting their privacy has been a priority. In this video we take a look at this relatively new trend that seems to be gaining popularity. 

------------------------------
SOURCES:

Teen trust youtubers more than their own family:
https://mediakix.com/blog/percent-children-becoming-a-youtuber/

1956 study on parasocial relationships:
http://visual-memory.co.uk/daniel/Documents/short/horton_and_wohl_1956.html

Stalker goes to youtuber‚Äôs home:
https://www.bbc.com/news/uk-england-merseyside-46986529

The Verge: ‚ÄúYouTubers are not your friends‚ÄĚ
https://www.theverge.com/2018/9/17/17832948/youtube-youtubers-influencer-creator-fans-subscribers-friends-celebrities



------------------------------
CREDITS:

Andrei Terbea - Lead Animator

Stefan Popa - Assistant Animator
https://www.instagram.com/jtefe.ro/

Nicoleta Toader - Producer

------------------------------
MUSIC:

Background track:  "Delusional (Instrumental)" by Spring Gang
Outro song: Joakim Karud - "Loudness & Clarity"
http://youtube.com/joakimkarud


------------------------------
#Faceless #CorpseHusband #VTuber

en.title: MaraŇülńĪ Episode 11
en.description:
MaraŇülńĪ Episode 11 - Summary:
"There is no operation anymore! There is MaraŇülńĪ!"
After being shot by Sami's men, MaraŇülńĪ rushes Mahur to the hospital, and Mahur is immediately taken to surgery. Upon receiving the news, Aziz, Firuzan, and ńįlhan rush to the hospital. The whole family blames MaraŇülńĪ for not being able to protect Mahur. MaraŇülńĪ swears to avenge the trap set up for him. How will MaraŇülńĪ take his revenge? ńįlhan and DilŇüad, who have buried Ozan's body, are in fear. Deciding to divorce, ńįlhan wants to kick DilŇüad out of the house. But DilŇüad does not give up easily and threatens ńįlhan. There is only one solution for ńįlhan. Will ńįlhan be able to implement this difficult decision? Having learned about ńįlhan's decision, what precautions will Necati take? Acar hides his son, Sami, from MaraŇülńĪ. Fearing MaraŇülńĪ to come, Acar falls into the hands of MaraŇülńĪ, even though he takes precautions. Will MaraŇülńĪ, who wants to reach Sami by making Acar talk, reach his goal? Since only Sami knows where the remaining goods are, SavaŇü takes him under protection. This situation pits MaraŇülńĪ and SavaŇü against each other. SavaŇü's men rake MaraŇülńĪ's house. SavaŇü threatens MaraŇülńĪ to let Sami go. MaraŇülńĪ, who wants to kill Sami, goes into combat with SavaŇü, who wants to keep him alive. This conflict will cause losses.

Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. SANńįYE BU KEZ GAFFUR'A NE CEZA VERECEK?
G√ľlten, yolunu kesen alacaklńĪ meselesini Gaffur'a anlatńĪr. Gaffur elbette olaylarńĪn √∂yle olmadńĪńüńĪnńĪ, konuŇüup halledeceńüini de s√∂yler ama ikisinin hen√ľz farkńĪnda olmadńĪńüńĪ ger√ßek, Saniye'nin onlarńĪ duymasńĪdńĪr! Ona bir s√ľrprizi olduńüunu s√∂yler. Saniye konak bah√ßesinde o g√ľn√ľn iŇülerini dańüńĪtńĪr. Gaffur'a tezek toplama g√∂revi verir. Gaffur barńĪŇümaya √ßalńĪŇüsa da Saniye'nin √∂fkesi dinmiyordur. Z√ľleyha ve Demir de bir Ňüeyler olduńüunu anlar.

Bir yandan kim olduńüunu bilmedińüi d√ľŇümanńĪ ile savaŇüan, bir yandan √úmit'e verdińüi s√∂z√ľn vicdan azabńĪnńĪ √ßeken Demir i√ßin, konakta ise adeta bahar havasńĪ vardńĪr. T√ľm Adana, Demir ve Z√ľleyha Yaman'ńĪn iŇü hayatńĪndaki baŇüarńĪlarńĪnńĪ ve mutluluklarńĪnńĪ konuŇüurken, Fikret'in b√ľy√ľk ses getirecek planńĪ hayata ge√ßmiŇütir. Ancak iŇüler onun istedińüi gibi gitmeyecektir!

MaraŇülńĪ hears that SavaŇü detains ńįlhan. MaraŇülńĪ interrogates Ozan and learns that SavaŇü has taken over the company. ńįlhan learns about the dirty work that he will transport by plane from SavaŇü. Will MaraŇülńĪ help ńįlhan, who is now in trouble? Mahur does not go abroad and confesses her love to MaraŇülńĪ. How will this confession affect the relationship between the two? Aziz learns that Mahur did not get on the plane. Firuzan opens up the subject of love again, but this time Aziz is also very suspicious. Aziz, who blames MaraŇülńĪ for what happened, cannot persuade Mahur, with whom he is at odds, to return home. Will Mahur be able to forgive her father? Will Aziz learn about the love between MaraŇülńĪ and Mahur? Necati asks Aziz, 'Why don't you tell that I was the one who killed √Ėmer?'. Aziz, who does not tell this truth to the household, wants to protect Necati by keeping him out of all things. Will the father and son make it up? MaraŇülńĪ learns about the dirty work of SavaŇü and sends a note to SavaŇü. SavaŇü delivers MaraŇülńĪ's note to his partner, whom he meets at the cemetery. Who is the partner of SavaŇü? snippet.description:
Masumlar ApartmanńĪ 26. B√∂l√ľm √Ėzeti:

ńįnci, yaŇüadńĪńüńĪ duygusal patlamanńĪn ardńĪndan herkesi kaygńĪlandńĪran davranńĪŇülar sergilemeye baŇülar. G√∂z√ľ ne Han‚ÄôńĪ ne de Memduh‚Äôla Ege‚Äôyi g√∂r√ľr. ńįnci‚Äônin kendine gelmesini sańülayan ise hi√ß umulmadńĪk biri olur.
Neriman babasńĪnńĪn √∂l√ľm√ľnden dolayńĪ kendini su√ßlayan Ege‚Äôye destek olurken kendini aŇüan bir harekette bulunur. Safiye ise olanlarńĪn ardńĪndan kendini temizlińüe verir. Tam kendine gelirken yaŇüanan yeni bir kriz, eski korkularńĪnńĪ canlandńĪrńĪr.
G√ľlben, hala Esat‚Äôla iyi ge√ßen buluŇümanńĪn etkisindeyken ondan gelen bir s√ľrprizle yeni hayallere dalar.
Han, Naci‚Äôyi g√∂ndermek konusunda kararlńĪdńĪr. Ancak yaptńĪńüńĪ hamlenin sonu√ßlarńĪ ańüńĪr olacaktńĪr.
Senaryosu Dr. G√ľlseren BudaycńĪońülu‚Äônun kitabńĪndan alńĪnarak hazńĪrlanan ve ger√ßek hayata dayalńĪ hikayelerden oluŇüan dizide, psikolojik sorunlarla bońüuŇüan bir ailenin yaŇüadńĪńüńĪ sńĪkńĪntńĪlar ve aile olmanńĪn sańüladńĪńüńĪ dayanńĪŇüma ile bu sńĪkńĪntńĪlarńĪn √ľstesinden gelmek i√ßin sergiledińüi √ßabalar anlatńĪlńĪyor.

snippet.title: Squishy Makeovers:  Easter Edition
snippet.description:
Welcome to another episode of squishy makeovers, where I transform ugly, used, old, dirty, cheap or unwanted squishies (donated by my subscribers) into my own creations. I repair, paint and cut away for hours on end to complete these. Hopefully you like them. Get used to lots of rainbow and sprinkles, because I am addicted to both!

PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

_________FAQs__________

1. CAN I SEND YOU SQUISHIES?
So many generous people have sent me their unwanted squishies so I actually have a lot to work on already, BUT if you desperately want to, you can request my mailing address in the email ALLLL the way at down in the description (sorry for the traveling), make sure to read the disclaimer down there as well.

2. ARE SQUISHIES RETURNED TO THE SENDERS AFTER THE MAKEOVER?
No. These squishies  are sent as donations to the series because they were damaged, and no longer wanted. Everyone has been informed in advance that squishies would not be returned. It would be waaay too complicated/expensive and massively time consuming to keep track of everyone and return each squishy. I'm just one person! 

3. WHAT PAINT DO YOU USE?
I use fabric paint. Fabric paint is meant to stretch, so it is perfect for squishing! Any brand will work fine, but I mainly use Tulip. You can find it at Michaels, Hobby Lobby, A.C. Moore, Walmart, Joann Fabrics, and Online.

5. WILL FABRIC PAINT CRACK?
The matte fabric paint is more likely to crack after lots of squishing. Slick fabric paints never crack. But there are benefits to both. I usually mix the two paints together to get the best of both worlds.

6. CAN I USE ACRYLIC PAINT ON SQUISHIES?
I would not recommend that. Acrylic paint will either make the squishy hard, or it will crack and flake off very easily.

You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL).

localized.title: Squishy Makeovers:  Easter Edition
localized.description:
Welcome to another episode of squishy makeovers, where I transform ugly, used, old, dirty, cheap or unwanted squishies (donated by my subscribers) into my own creations. I repair, paint and cut away for hours on end to complete these. Hopefully you like them. Get used to lots of rainbow and sprinkles, because I am addicted to both!

PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

_________FAQs__________

1. CAN I SEND YOU SQUISHIES?
So many generous people have sent me their unwanted squishies so I actually have a lot to work on already, BUT if you desperately want to, you can request my mailing address in the email ALLLL the way at down in the description (sorry for the traveling), make sure to read the disclaimer down there as well.

2. ARE SQUISHIES RETURNED TO THE SENDERS AFTER THE MAKEOVER?
No. These squishies  are sent as donations to the series because they were damaged, and no longer wanted. Everyone has been informed in advance that squishies would not be returned. It would be waaay too complicated/expensive and massively time consuming to keep track of everyone and return each squishy. I'm just one person! 

3. WHAT PAINT DO YOU USE?
I use fabric paint. Fabric paint is meant to stretch, so it is perfect for squishing! Any brand will work fine, but I mainly use Tulip. You can find it at Michaels, Hobby Lobby, A.C. Moore, Walmart, Joann Fabrics, and Online.

5. WILL FABRIC PAINT CRACK?
The matte fabric paint is more likely to crack after lots of squishing. Slick fabric paints never crack. But there are benefits to both. I usually mix the two paints together to get the best of both worlds.

6. CAN I USE ACRYLIC PAINT ON SQUISHIES?
I would not recommend that. Acrylic paint will either make the squishy hard, or it will crack and flake off very easily. 



___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

snippet.title: The ROG Phone 5 has a Problem - Durability Test Fail!
snippet.description:
The ROG Phone 5 is the most powerful gaming phone on the market... but is it durable? Today we find out. Grab your pocket sized Anker Charger here: US: https://ankerfast.club/30T6Tce UK: https://ankerfast.club/3bVfIbW DE: https://ankerfast.club/30RPy3x The ROG phone 5 is a pretty expensive and powerful gaming smartphone. Its lost the iconic aerodynamic hump from the previous 3 versions of the phone, and now the ROG 5 has added dual batteries so it can charge faster. But will that compromise the Structural integrity of the ROG 5? I mean... yeah. You've seen the thumbnail. The ROG Phone five definitely has some structural issues....

snippet.title: RICH STUDENT VS POOR STUDENT || Rich Girl Vs Broke Girl Funny Situations by Crafty Panda
snippet.description:
Hey there, student Pandas! It‚Äôs no secret that rich people live a bit differently than the poor. But what about the students? snippet.title: Yemin 322. B√∂l√ľm | The Promise Season 3 Episode 322
snippet.description:
Yemin 322. B√∂l√ľm √Ėzeti:
Feride verdińüi erken karar Emir'in dikkatini √ßeker.Verdińüi kararńĪn arkasńĪnda √∂fke olduńüunu zanneden Emir Feride'yi uyarmaya √ßalńĪŇüńĪr.Feride ise kararńĪndan vazge√ßmez. Dińüer yandan Kemal Masal'ńĪn babasńĪyńĪm diye ortaya √ßńĪkan adamla bir anlaŇüma yapar.Fakat yapńĪlan anlaŇümada Kemal oyuna gelir.Narin ise bir an olsun Kemal'in yanńĪndan ayrńĪlmaz.


Abone olun / Subscribe / Suscr√≠bete: https://bit.ly/2VWzKrR

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

#Yemin
#ThePromise

17 Mart √áarŇüamba 

Kendini yine Zeynep'in ge√ßmiŇüinin g√∂lgesinin d√ľŇüt√ľńü√ľ bir √ßatńĪŇümanńĪn ve arayńĪŇüńĪn i√ßinde bulan BarńĪŇü ise bir kes daha sevdińüi kadńĪna destek olacaktńĪr. Zeynep'le y√ľr√ľnen yol dikenlidir. Zeynep'in hayatńĪyla i√ß i√ße ge√ßen hayat beklenmedik olaylarla doludur, peki bir tebess√ľm, bir sevgi s√∂zc√ľńü√ľ t√ľm bu zorluklarńĪ unutmaya yeter mi? 

Mehdi tek baŇüńĪna bebeńüine bakmayńĪ ve onu kimselere vermemeyi kafasńĪna koymuŇütur. Nuh'un resti ve Cemile'nin sonunda onunla y√ľzleŇüip yaptńĪklarńĪnńĪ yargńĪlamasńĪ sonrasńĪ tamamen yalnńĪzdńĪr. Ge√ßmiŇüi deńüiŇütirmek isterken, bug√ľn√ľn√ľ ve geleceńüini alt √ľst eden Mehdi i√ßin karar zamanńĪ gelmiŇütir. Her Ňüeyi geride bńĪrakńĪp eski g√ľnlere, eski hayata d√∂nmek m√ľmk√ľn m√ľ? Sen inkar ettińüinde ger√ßekler h√ľk√ľms√ľz m√ľd√ľr? Kendinden ka√ßabilirsin ama kurtulabilir misin?

Yeni aŇüklarńĪn, eriyen buzlarńĪn, omuz omuza verip zorluklarńĪ aŇümanńĪn aydńĪnlattńĪńüńĪ ufuklara kara bulutlar yeniden toplanńĪyor.
Ge√ßmiŇüte olanlar Ňüimdinin girizgahńĪydńĪ, gelecek ise bug√ľn yaptńĪklarńĪmńĪza bańülńĪ.

snippet.title: Yemin 321. B√∂l√ľm | The Promise Season 3 Episode 321
snippet.description:
Yemin 321. B√∂l√ľm √Ėzeti:
Emir, Reyhan'nńĪn baŇüka biriyle buluŇümasńĪndan rahatsńĪzlńĪk duyar. BuluŇümada neler olduńüunu √∂ńürenmek i√ßin Feride ile bir konuŇüma ger√ßekleŇütirir.Dińüer yandan Emir'in kendine yaptńĪńüńĪ iyilińüin karŇüńĪlńĪńüńĪnda Cemre, Talaz'ńĪ polise ihbar eder.Talaz'ńĪ polisler tutuklayńĪp g√∂t√ľrd√ľkten sonra Cemre Emir'in yanńĪna giderek ona veda eder.Kemal Masal'ńĪn ger√ßek babasńĪnńĪn evinde olduńüundan habersiz onunla vakit ge√ßirir.Masal'ńĪn ger√ßek babasńĪ yaptńĪńüńĪ bir hareketle Kemal'i fena halde sinirlendirir.Bu olayńĪn intikamńĪnńĪ almak √ßok da uzun s√ľrmeyecektir.
Abone olun / Subscribe / Suscr√≠bete: https://bit.ly/2VWzKrR

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

#Yemin
#ThePromise
